examples: Would-be Elvis Presleys can sing along to "Jailhouse Rock," "Love me Tender," and "Blue Suede Shoes."
Oh, I feel so sleepy, Oh, Jailhouse baby.
He calls himself a jailhouse litigator (" jailhouse lawyer ", he explains, "sounds cheap").
Jailhouse informants, many of whom are seeking reduced time or special privileges, are notoriously unreliable.
In a jailhouse phone call with CNN, Russ hinted he'd eavesdropped on other inmates.
